_meta.catalog_scope: Current official requirements researched 2026-07-23; UCR uses its latest controlling 2025-26 catalog PDF.
_meta.purpose: Nine full four-year Biology graduation templates for the exact ASSIST program pins in server/config/majors.js. Major preparation, governing GE, upper-division minima, and degree-unit closure are sourced separately so a human can verify each layer.
modeling_policy: The authored unit budget uses one explicitly documented canonical minimum-unit path where a catalog offers alternatives; higher-unit alternatives remain visible and their effect is noted.

A course is lower division only when its course number is below 100. Requirement-section labels do not override course level: UCSB CHEM 109A/B, UC Merced BIO 110, and UCR BCH 100/110A are university-only.
GE units are the derived distinct remainder after named major overlaps under the documented transfer lens, not a second copy of science/math already counted in the major.
Elective capacity is a derived balancing amount to the published degree minimum. It is explicitly UC-transferable capacity, not a claim that a particular associate degree contains the right courses.
Residence, GPA, certification, and proficiency gates are retained in notes or zero-unit rows; they are not invented as course units.
All records remain AI-researched and must be human-verified before production import or enabling the major's degreeTemplates capability.

unit_audit.canonical_path: Standard MCB chemistry path; MATH 51/52; one 4-unit physics course; minimum 21-unit active emphasis.

modeling_notes: MCB has eleven active emphasis/track paths and no single official major subtotal. This template uses the common 38-unit preparation path plus the catalog-stated 21-unit minimum emphasis.
The BBS Track 2 chemistry routes raise lower-division preparation to approximately 40 or 42 units; those alternatives require a separate variant before production use.

Distinct GE is derived as two R&C courses, five breadth areas not already met by MCB science, and American Cultures. Quantitative Reasoning and two science breadth areas overlap the canonical major path; language is a proficiency gate.

L&S requires 36 upper-division units, including six outside the major, plus residence rules. The 15-unit additional upper block reaches 36 under the 21-unit major minimum and includes the outside-major constraint.

data_quality_flags.message: Choose and hand-verify one MCB emphasis/track; Track 2 chemistry has a larger lower-division total.
PHYSICS 8B is no longer required for expected graduation Fall 2026 or later; confirm catalog rights for the analyzed cohort.

CHEM 4A may substitute for CHEM 1A/1AL. Track 2 chemistry variants are documented but not collapsed into this canonical path.

unit_audit.canonical_path: Minimum-unit preparation (CHE 8A/B and MAT 21A/B) plus minimum 42-unit upper-division major path.

modeling_notes: The official major is 97–115 units: 55–65 preparation plus a choice-dependent depth/lab/restricted-elective block. This canonical model uses the published minimums.
The 22-unit additional upper block brings the 42-unit minimum major depth to the College's 64-upper-division graduation floor; it includes upper-division composition.

GE/Core Literacy designations overlap each other and the science major. Forty distinct quarter units is a transfer-lens estimate after major overlap; verify against a student audit rather than treating 52 Topical Breadth plus 35 Core Literacy as additive.

The current 2026–27 catalog introduced BIO 1/1L/2/2L/3. Official transition guidance says CC courses continue to articulate to BIS 2A/B/C in the short term, so the whole legacy series is retained as an alternative rather than inventing one-to-one aliases.

data_quality_flags.message: Verify the approved whole-series substitution from BIS 2A/B/C to BIO 1/1L/2/2L/3 on a 2026–27 Biological Sciences audit.
A lab may satisfy depth or restricted electives, but not both; verify the chosen 42-unit minimum path.

modeling_notes: UCSD has no major-owned GE. This one-document engine cannot yet select among eight residential colleges, so Warren is the explicit canonical lens used by the historical CS template; the full variant matrix is retained for the future dimension.
General Biology lower division is 71–72 units and upper division is exactly 48. The canonical path uses the 71-unit alternative.
Thirty-six lower GE units are a derived remainder of the full Cal-GETC/IGETC pattern after science and quantitative overlap with Biology; human verification should use an actual certification audit.
Warren's two post-certification courses contribute eight upper units; four more units reach UCSD's 60-upper-unit degree minimum.
